{{Quote|The light side knows my destiny, and that is all that matters.|A member of the Freedom Warriors|<ref name="TotJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref>}}
The '''Freedom Warriors''' were an elite group of [[Special forces/Legends|specially trained soldiers]] who aided the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] during resource-intensive operations<ref name="RoE">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref> and dealt with responsibilities too politically inconvenient for the Republic's government to directly address.<ref name="TotJC" /> Membership was limited to non-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]], though despite this limitation, they were able to take on [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-tainted [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] and [[Sithspawn/Legends|sithspawned]] monsters.<ref name="RoE" /> By the era leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the Freedom Warriors had been in existence for at least three generations.<ref name="TotJC" />

A typical Freedom Warrior wore [[TYI flex-armor|flex-armor]] and carried a modified [[pulse-wave blaster]] [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] and a [[PTP link]] communications device.<ref name="TotJC" />
